clusters.leadHeadline: NWSL Expands to Columbus with Haslams' $205M Investment
clusters.summary: Women's soccer league adds 18th franchise in Ohio with Haslam Sports Group ownership. Marks continued growth strategy for NWSL as it pursues mainstream sports legitimacy.

clusters.leadHeadline: Churchill Downs Acquires Preakness Stakes IP Rights for $85M
clusters.summary: Derby operator consolidates racing's crown jewel intellectual property portfolio. Strategic move centralizes control of Triple Crown marketing and broadcast rights.

clusters.leadHeadline: NFL Rookie Deals Will Top $50M for First Time Since 2010
clusters.summary: This year's top pick will earn nearly $55 million, reflecting inflated rookie salary scale. Represents significant shift in NFL compensation structure over past 15 years.

clusters.leadHeadline: Illinois Lawmakers Race Clock on $5B Bears Stadium Plan
clusters.summary: State legislators push toward approval as NFL franchise relocation decision looms. Multi-billion dollar infrastructure deal hangs on political consensus.

clusters.leadHeadline: NIL Dispute Over 'Associated Entities' Could Eliminate Salary Cap
clusters.summary: College sports compensation battle centers on defining what constitutes NIL funding sources. Unresolved definitional issues threaten entire regulatory framework.

clusters.leadHeadline: ESPN Defends NCAA Gymnastics Coverage After Minnesota Criticism
clusters.summary: Network faces backlash over unequal airtime distribution across collegiate athletic broadcasts. Raises questions about editorial standards in women's sports coverage.

clusters.leadHeadline: TickPick Acquires Momento App to Expand Fan Engagement Platform
clusters.summary: Ticket marketplace consolidates live event memory-sharing technology. Strategic acquisition positions TickPick as end-to-end fan experience provider.

poll.question: Will the NWSL's Columbus expansion at $205M set the price floor for future women's sports franchises?
options: Yes, this is the new baseline for women's league expansion
No, NWSL valuations won't translate to other sports
It depends on the next expansion team announcement
Women's sports will eventually command much higher valuations
